程序包 edu.bupt.ta.model

类 Job

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.model.Job
public class Job extends Object
Represents a job posting in the TA Recruitment System. Jobs are created by Module Organisers (MOs) and contain requirements such as required skills, working hours, and a deadline for applications. Maps to the jobs.csv file.

  • 构造器概要

    Full constructor.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Job

      public Job()
      Default constructor.

    • Job

      public Job(String jobId, String title, String moduleCode, String organiser, int minYear, int maxYear, int hours, JobStatus status, String requiredSkills, int matchScore, String deadline, int vacancies)
      Full constructor.
      参数:
      jobId - unique job ID
      title - job title
      moduleCode - course module code
      organiser - MO display name
      minYear - minimum academic year
      maxYear - maximum academic year
      hours - weekly working hours
      status - job status
      requiredSkills - pipe-separated skill requirements
      matchScore - pre-computed match score (0-100)
      deadline - application deadline in "yyyy-MM-dd" format
      vacancies - number of open positions
